description: OpenAI Codex CLI — agentic coding with sandboxed execution
description_zh: OpenAI Codex CLI —— 沙盒执行的智能编码助手

configSchema.label: Authentication
configSchema.description: env = read OPENAI_API_KEY from system; custom = use the key below
configSchema.description_zh: env = 从系统读取 OPENAI_API_KEY；custom = 使用下方自定义密钥

configSchema.label: Approval Mode
configSchema.description: untrusted = only run trusted commands without asking · on-request = model decides when to ask · never = never ask (pair with sandbox)
configSchema.description_zh: untrusted = 仅可信命令免询问 · on-request = 由模型决定何时询问 · never = 从不询问（建议配合 sandbox 使用）

configSchema.label: Sandbox Policy
configSchema.description: read-only = no writes · workspace-write = write inside workspace · danger-full-access = no sandbox
configSchema.description_zh: read-only = 只读 · workspace-write = 仅工作区可写 · danger-full-access = 无沙盒

configSchema.label: Enable opendray skills
configSchema.description: WARNING: enabling skills overrides CODEX_HOME to a per-session scratch dir. ChatGPT-OAuth login state in ~/.codex/ will not be visible inside the session — only safe for OPENAI_API_KEY env auth.
configSchema.description_zh: 警告：启用后会把 CODEX_HOME 指向 per-session 临时目录，~/.codex/ 里的 ChatGPT-OAuth 登录将不可用 — 仅适用 OPENAI_API_KEY 环境变量认证的场景。
